creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Hello world :-)

I was just testing various drm-*-kmod on 14.1-RELEASE-p4 AMD64 for my amdgpu.

I noticed that make install in /usr/ports/graphics/gpu-firmware-amd-kmod only builds firmware for aldebaran. My polaris10 was missing. I had to build all graphics/gpu-firmware-kmod (along with intel and radeon) to get all firmwares for amdgpu.

Is this a bug or a feature? :-)
